title: pipeline sentinel
description: lineage-aware monitoring for ETL pipelines. detects schema drift and surfaces blast-radius before deploys.

title: terraform stack
description: opinionated module set for multi-region postgres, redis, and edge workers. one-command bootstrap.

title: edge cache
description: selective cache invalidation across cloudflare workers. surrogate keys, tag-based purge, sub-100ms p99.

title: deploy cli
description: internal release tool with safe-rollback, canary stages, and slack-integrated approvals.

title: latency lab
description: controlled fault injection for staging environments. network partitions, slow disks, clock skew.

title: rack runner
description: self-healing job runner for batch workloads. surfaces stuck shards before they page anyone.
